name: digi-pulse-backend
afterHooks: if docker ps -a --format '{{.Names}}' | grep -q 'digipulse-app'; then docker exec digipulse-app php artisan config:clear; docker exec digipulse-app php artisan cache:clear; docker exec digipulse-app php artisan optimize; docker restart digipulse-app digipulse-worker digipulse-scheduler; else echo 'Containers not found. Run terraform apply first.'; fi
